jobs.title: Validate artifact manifest structure
jobs.description: Runs structural checks on `buildCrystalArtifactManifest` output (or pre-supplied manifest).

jobs.title: Validate required artifact rows
jobs.description: Ensures core pack rows declare util paths and annual readiness is coherent.

jobs.title: Validate generation order consistency
jobs.description: Ensures generation order covers all node ids.

jobs.title: Validate machine-readable contracts list
jobs.description: Ensures contract table lists key packs for doc/util drift tooling.

jobs.title: Validate pack markdown render smoke
jobs.description: Optional smoke: render markdown for manifest, OS, automation packs.

jobs.title: Report manual follow-ups
jobs.description: Surfaces manual artifacts and external rows ŌĆö never fail-hard by default.

validationChecks.title: Artifact manifest util + table path documented
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Manifest layer missing or broken ŌĆö downstream CI cannot name artifacts.
validationChecks.recommendedAction: Restore util, script, and committed table JSON.

validationChecks.title: buildCrystalArtifactManifest returns structured manifest
validationChecks.summary: Manifest builder yields artifacts, generationOrder, dependencyGraph.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Manifest builder failed or returned empty ŌĆö CI has nothing to validate.
validationChecks.recommendedAction: Fix inputs or manifest util regression.

validationChecks.title: Core pack utils declared on manifest rows
validationChecks.summary: Annual, capability, OS, automation artifacts list utilPath / scriptPath where applicable.
validationChecks.expectedCondition: Rows for annual, capability, OS, automation have non-null utilPath.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Cannot locate generator entrypoints from manifest alone.

validationChecks.title: Annual artifact status reflects inputs
validationChecks.summary: When year inputs exist, annual row should be `ready` not stuck `manual` in assessment.
validationChecks.expectedCondition: If `annualPackPresent` in underlying OS context, annual artifact status is `ready`.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Annual export missing ŌĆö OS/capability chain is incomplete.

validationChecks.title: Generation order lists every artifact id
validationChecks.expectedCondition: No orphan artifact id outside generation order list.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: CI cannot enforce a total order for tooling.

validationChecks.title: Dependency graph has no cycles
validationChecks.summary: Directed edges among artifacts must be acyclic.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Artifact dependencies contradict ŌĆö cannot run generators safely.
validationChecks.recommendedAction: Fix dependsOn edges in manifest util.

validationChecks.title: Machine-readable contracts cover key packs
validationChecks.summary: artifactContracts includes monthly, annual, capability, OS, automation, manifest entries.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Docs/util linkage not enumerated for CI drift checks.

validationChecks.title: Pack markdown render smoke (OS + automation + manifest)
validationChecks.summary: Public render* functions succeed on current inputs (optional smoke).
validationChecks.expectedCondition: No throw from renderCrystal*Markdown when smoke enabled.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Pack output broken ŌĆö CI markdown artifact job would fail.
validationChecks.recommendedAction: Fix throw in util or pass valid fixture inputs in CI.

validationChecks.title: External / future artifacts flagged
validationChecks.summary: multi_year history remains external ŌĆö not treated as automated.
validationChecks.expectedCondition: Category `external_or_future` row exists with manual status.
validationChecks.failureMeaning: Team might assume history pack exists in-repo.
validationChecks.recommendedAction: Keep manifest row until a util ships.

failHardChecks.title: Artifact manifest util + table path documented
failHardChecks.failureMeaning: Manifest layer missing or broken ŌĆö downstream CI cannot name artifacts.
failHardChecks.recommendedAction: Restore util, script, and committed table JSON.

failHardChecks.failureMeaning: Pack output broken ŌĆö CI markdown artifact job would fail.

failSoftChecks.summary: Annual, capability, OS, automation artifacts list utilPath / scriptPath where applicable.
failSoftChecks.expectedCondition: Rows for annual, capability, OS, automation have non-null utilPath.

manualFollowups: Manual artifact: annual_operating_review_pack: Annual operating review pack
Manual artifact: multi_year_history_external: Multi-year / long-horizon history
Rolling inputs (weekly/monthly/quarterly JSON) are still assembled outside this spec unless refs are attached.
Release `releaseSignals` on annual JSON remains an ops discipline ŌĆö not enforced here.
artifactCoverageSummary: Manifest enumerates 13 artifacts; CI spec attaches 9 validation checks across 7 jobs.
ciReadinessSummary: 1 soft check(s) warn ŌĆö pipeline usable with manual follow-ups.
recommendedNextCiUpgrades: Attach file paths or digests for monthly/quarterly generators when running OS review.
Include releaseSignals in annual input for release linkage.
Add a CI step: `node --test tests/crystalArtifactCiValidation.util.test.js` (or full ops subset).
Gate merge on zero hard-check failures only ŌĆö allow soft warnings with label `artifact-review-stack:soft-fail-ok`.
methodNote: CI spec is a minimal validation catalog ŌĆö it does not start servers, run production queries, or change routing/wording/mismatch semantics.
